summary: Added the first shared Dolphin-style type headers and global include scaffold, including fixed-width aliases like s8/u8/f32, volatile aliases, BOOL/TRUE/FALSE/NULL, and matrix/vector typedefs for Vec, Quaternion, Mtx, MtxPtr, Mtx44, and Mtx44Ptr. The Makefile include path was expanded so compiler searches include/dolphin and include/dolphin/mtx directly, and .vscode/ was added to .gitignore.
what_changed: Created include/dolphin/types.h with signed, unsigned, volatile, floating-point, BOOL, TRUE, FALSE, and NULL definitions.
Created include/dolphin/mtx/mtxtypes.h with geometry and matrix typedefs: Vec, Quaternion, Mtx, MtxPtr, Mtx44, and Mtx44Ptr.
Created include/global.h as a central include wrapper for dolphin/types.h, functions.h, and variables.h.
Updated Makefile INCLUDES from '-i include -i src' to also include '-i include/dolphin/' and '-i include/dolphin/mtx/'.
Added .vscode/ to .gitignore under an IDE section.
smart_moves: Established common primitive typedefs early so future decompilation work could use stable project-wide names such as u8, s32, f32, and BOOL instead of ad hoc C built-in types.
Separated Dolphin SDK-style primitive types from matrix/vector types by placing mtxtypes.h under include/dolphin/mtx, matching the apparent subsystem organization.
Added include path entries for the new Dolphin and MTX include directories immediately with the headers, reducing friction for later source files that include these headers directly.
Introduced global.h as a central aggregation point for common type, function, and variable declarations.
decomp_lessons: Foundational typedef headers are useful decomp infrastructure: they allow later matched functions and structs to share consistent SDK-like primitive names.
Matrix and vector typedefs should be centralized rather than duplicated across gameplay or engine files, especially for common Dolphin SDK types like Vec and Mtx.
When adding nested include directories, update build include paths in the same PR so follow-up decomp work can use either local or subsystem-style includes.
Keep repo hygiene changes small and scoped; this PR only added .vscode/ to .gitignore alongside the header/bootstrap changes.
naming_conventions: Primitive integer typedefs use lowercase Dolphin-style names: s8, s16, s32, s64, u8, u16, u32, u64.
Volatile primitive typedefs prefix the base type with v: vu8, vu16, vu32, vu64, vs8, vs16, vs32, vs64, vf32, vf64.
Floating-point typedefs use f32 and f64.
Boolean compatibility uses uppercase BOOL with TRUE and FALSE macros.
Geometry typedefs use Dolphin/MTX-style capitalization: Vec, Quaternion, Mtx, MtxPtr, Mtx44, Mtx44Ptr.

Header guards in the added files were mixed style: __TYPES_H__ in types.h, _global_h_ in global.h, and _mtxtypes_h_ / _mtxtype_h_ in mtxtypes.h. The mtxtypes.h guard macro names differ between #ifndef and #define in the diff excerpt, so this PR is not strong evidence for a clean guard convention.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly-specific matching tactics were discussed in the PR context.
The practical matching aid was type normalization: adding SDK-like typedefs makes future C signatures, structs, and arrays closer to expected decompiled source form.
review_feedback: No issue comments or review comments were present in the provided PR context.
One review is counted, but no review body or actionable feedback was included in the excerpt.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that modify include/dolphin/types.h for typedef correctness or SDK compatibility.
Find later PRs that fix or standardize the mtxtypes.h include guard mismatch.
Search for first uses of Vec, Mtx, Mtx44, and Quaternion in matched source files.
Search for later changes to Makefile include paths after include/dolphin was introduced.
Find conventions established later for global.h, functions.h, and variables.h aggregation.
